headline: Community Health Center Model Piloted in 15 Underserved Areas
context: MOH launched 15 community health centers integrating primary care, mental health, and social services in 2025.

cards.big: 15 integrated community health centers launched in 2025 serving 180,000 underserved residents
cards.sub: Model combines primary care mental health and social work under one roof

cards.big: Pilot centers reduced emergency department visits by 28% in their catchment areas
cards.sub: Accessible primary care diverts patients from expensive hospital emergency services

cards.big: Each center costs RM4.2 million annually versus RM18 million for equivalent hospital services
cards.sub: Community-based model delivers care at 23% of hospital-based cost per patient

cards.big: Cuba's polyclinic model serves 98% of population through 450 community health centers
cards.sub: Comprehensive primary care network achieves better outcomes than hospital-centric systems

cards.big: 15 pilot centers for 33 million people is a promising start that needs 500 more
Should Malaysia commit to building 200 integrated community health centers by 2030
